Could you imagine anything prettier? 🥹✨

🇺🇸 This is the deep south of the Egyptian Red Sea, and it’s a place so magical that it keeps calling us back 🩵 After 5 years of running expeditions here, it is still an incredible destination that never ceases to amaze us 🥰

We will be launching new dates soon, for late 2026 and 2027 😍 

Comment DOLPHIN DREAM to get first dibs when we do 🙌🏼

•

🇮🇹 Riesci ad immaginarti niente di più meraviglioso? 🥹✨

Questo è il profondo sud del Mar Rosso egiziano, ed è un luogo così magico che ci richiama ogni anno 🩵 Dopo 5 anni che organizziamo viaggi di gruppo qui, è ancora una destinazione che non finisce di lasciarci senza fiato 🥰

Stiamo per lanciare nuove date, per fine 2026 e per tutto il 2027 😍

Commenta DOLPHIN DREAM per avere pre-accesso alle prenotazioni 🙌🏼

Red Sea • Egypt • Underwater Photographer • Ocean Lover • Coral • Dolphins

The plan: position a group of humans in near-freezing Alaskan water, wait for chunks of glacier to calve into the sea, and ride the wave it creates. The reality: a couple small waves and a lot of very cold patience. Still one of the wildest things I’ve ever watched people attempt. 

#alaska #pnwdiscovered #25bluehours

EDC LAS VEGAS: THRU MY EYES 🎇 🎆

Three years ago, I attended EDCLV as a first-time festival goer with no idea of what I was stepping into. I remember specifically walking through the raceway tunnels and coming out to see a panoramic view of what I called “Neon Disneyland” 🤣. It honestly felt like the craziesttt culture shock I had ever experienced in my life, and it made me fall in love with EDM in a way I never expected.

The more time I spent in the rave scene from that point on, the more I continued to discover the best parts of myself while simultaneously meeting some of the most incredible human beings who have genuinely lifted me up just by existing in the same space.

There’s something about EDC that never really gets old. It’s a feeling that can only be truly understood when you’re standing under the fireworks, surrounded by your favorite people in the world, and completely present in the moment… like you’re exactly where you’re supposed to be.
I have so much gratitude for the festival that gave me all of that. So much that I can love it again… and again… and again 🩵

🎶 John Newman - Love Me Again (KNOIR Remix)

🫣 Disclaimer: 

🇺🇸 Honestly, it’s not the most comfortable suitcase. That’s a fact. It’s heavy and bulky to carry 🙈

But as of today, we’ve used it for 3+ years, travelling almost full time, and it’s held on pretty well and we’ve always managed to travel with our fins without any trouble or extra costs 🙌🏼 

We’ve also heard that if your fins aren’t super long like ours, you could be able to use another Cressi suitcase, the Moby, but we have no personal experience with that. We also have no affiliation with Cressi, fyi 👀

We also know some people swear by taking them in as cabin luggage, and we applaud your bravery ahah 👏🏼😂 But I feel like we’ve travelled too much (or are now too old 😱) to handle that kind of stress any more 😂 It probably also depends if you travel with low cost airlines or not

Let us know if you have any interesting persona experiences to share 😍👇🏼

•

🇮🇹 🫣 Avviso:

Onestamente, non è la valigia più comoda del mondo, anzi. Purtroppo è così, è pesante e faticosa 🙈

Ma ad oggi, la usiamo da più di 3 anni, viaggiando quasi a tempo pieno, e si è comportata piuttosto bene e siamo sempre riusciti a viaggiare con le nostre pinne senza problemi o costi aggiuntivi (tra l’altro non abbiamo nessuna affiliazione con Cressi) 🙌🏼

Abbiamo anche sentito parlare bene della valigia Moby (sempre Cressi), ma devi avere le pinne un po’ più corte delle nostre 👀

Sappiamo anche che alcune persone sono convintissime di portarle come bagaglio a mano, e ammiriamo il loro coraggio ahah 👏🏼😂 Ma credo che ormai abbiamo viaggiato troppo (o siamo ormai troppo vecchi 😱) per gestire ancora questo tipo di stress 😂 Probabilmente dipende anche se viaggi con linee aeree low cost o no

Fateci sapere nei commenti se avete esperienze interessanti da condividere 😍👇🏼

Osaka street photography shot on the Lumix L10 📸

This time last month I was battling salmonella while in Osaka with LUMIX for the launch of the L10 😅

Unfortunately I spent most of the trip in the hotel room and only made it out to shoot once 💀

Not ideal, but I still had a great time and can’t wait to get back to Japan to be able to explore it properly 🙏🇯🇵

After that, flew straight to Bali for something very special 👀

But more on that later!

📸 Lumix L10
💻 Edited with my Lightroom Presets (linked in bio)

Last day on @milosurfboat and we got some sunshine! Alaska was beautiful no matter the weather, but ending with some sunshine was a real treat. 🏔️🌊

#alaska #surftrip #mavic3pro #coldwatersurf #pacific

A little bit of life from the past month 📸

I’ve been super dialled in on YouTube this year.

That’s where 95% of my focus is at and that’s where all my energy for content is going.

I see it as the platform where I can share the most, impact the most, grow the most and get the most out.

It’s a wild place.

I have a constant thought in my mind though - ‘post on Watzac, post on Watzac’ 😅

So here we are, a little life update and some of my favourite frames from the past 30 days

See you guys soon ✌️

How to shoot the city at night 🌃📸

No tripod, no editing... Just knowing where to l👀k.

Pro tips from the shoot:

👇Get the lens as low as possible to make the shot interesting. Look for reflections or make your own

📸 Zoom in to isolate your subject and compress your background 

👀 Look for unique natural frames to make your images more interesting

📱 Let AI do the heavy lifting in low light

SAVE this reel for your next city night shoot 🎥

All shot on the @australia_honor Magic 8 Pro using Night Mode and AI Image Enhance - straight out of camera.

@australia_honor #HonortheMoment

Strangers like me 🥹

🇺🇸 If you’ve ever been swimming with dolphins you know how accurate the description “strangers like me” feels 🩵🐬 This song from Tarzan really says it all! 

There’s something so similar, and yet still very different about dolphins, that it somehow feels like we are one of the same family 🥰

And that’s a feeling of love that you really can get addicted to 🥹 Comment DOLPHIN DREAM to join us next year 🐬 We are launching new dates in a week (28/06) ✨

•

🇮🇹 Strangers like me 🥹

Se hai mai nuotato con i delfini sai quant’è precisa la descrizione “sconosciuti come me” 🩵🐬 Questa canzone dal film di Tarzan dice tutto! 

C’è qualcosa di veramente simile, e al contempo molto diversa, che ci fa sentire in qualche modo come se fossimo parte di una stessa famiglia 🥰

E quella sensazione di amore crea davvero dipendenza 🥹 Commenta DOLPHIN DREAM per venire con noi l’anno prossimo 🐬 Stiamo per lanciare nuove date (tra una settimana 28/06) ✨

Nothing to lose, everything to gain

Probably one of my favorite dive sites ever 🥹

🇺🇸 Isn’t this just like the Little Mermaid’s treasure grotto? I’ve dove this site a few times now, but it’s safe to say that it never gets old for me 🥹 It just feels like plunging into a magical underwater world of corals, light rays, dark nooks, beautiful silvery fish and sparkling towers ✨

The Red Sea is one of our favorite places in the world. If you’ve never been yet, you HAVE to add it to your bucket list! Join us next year on our expedition: comment DOLPHIN DREAM for more info! 🐬 We’ll be launching new dates on the 28th 🙌🏼

•

🇮🇹 Probabilmente uno dei nostri siti di immersioni preferiti di sempre 🥹

Non è esattamente come la caverna dei tesori della Sirenetta? Ci siamo immersi in questo posto più volte ormai, ma non finisce mai di stufarci 🥹 Sembra di immergersi in un magico mondo sottomarino di coralli, raggi di luce, angoli bui, pesciolini argentei e torri scintillanti ✨

Il Mar Rosso è uno dei nostri luoghi preferiti al mondo. Se non ci sei mai stato/a, DEVI assolutamente aggiungerlo alla tua lista di viaggi 🩵 Puoi anche venire con noi l’anno prossimo: commenta DOLPHIN DREAM per più info! 🐬 Stiamo per lanciare date nuove il 28 giugno 🙌🏼
